# task\-skeleton\-brief — Widen skeleton: \`waystation brief \-\-task \<id\>\`
status: done  priority: 1  scope: scope-core

Implement the core feature: a task\-scoped brief that gives an agent only the context it needs \(spec §10\)\. Assemble goal, acceptance criteria, status, scope rules, applicable prompts, dependencies, open issues, recent handoffs, relevant decisions, and next action — while excluding unrelated tasks and full history\.

## Acceptance
- \`waystation brief \-\-task \<id\>\` returns the task goal, acceptance criteria, status, scope rules, selected prompts, dependencies, and open risks/next action\.
- The brief excludes unrelated tasks, closed issues \(unless requested\), and full event history\.
- \`\-\-json\` is supported\.
- Brief budget values \(small/medium/large/full\) are accepted; the smallest still includes goal, blockers, and next action\.
- bun:test covers scoped inclusion/exclusion for at least one task\.
